title: [release-1.6] [CI:BUILD] Cirrus: update PATH for go binary on M1
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>


release-1.6 also failed on cirrus cron though CI passed. Not sure how that happened.

comments.body: Looks like main passes though. The only two differences I see are the path on main and the go version.
There was a similar issue on one of the buildah branches as well. I'll check how it goes there. Thanks @ashley-cui !
(To link the work, see https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1841 with similar failures.)
